archives.justification: Ignore everything not included in the module itself

exclude.justification: The implementation package is not meant to be used directly, and as such does not need to maintain any backwards compatibility guarantees.

differences.justification: Ignore new methods on all types, as these are not meant to be implemented but simply consumed; as such, new methods are perfectly fine to add
Intentional overload: hasActiveElements accepts either String... element IDs or ElementSelector... selectors. The vararg parameter types are unambiguous at call sites.
Intentional overload: hasCompletedElements accepts either String... element IDs or ElementSelector... selectors. The vararg parameter types are unambiguous at call sites.
Intentional overload: hasTerminatedElements accepts either String... element IDs or ElementSelector... selectors. The vararg parameter types are unambiguous at call sites.
